message:
refactor: premium styling across all wizard pages

Updates remaining wizard pages with design system OKLCH colors and
premium UI patterns:

- install-terminal: Premium headers, TerminalCard component, AlertCard
- rent-vps: Cloud icon, improved provider cards, OKLCH colors
- create-vps: HardDrive icon, premium input styling, OKLCH validation
- reconnect-ubuntu: UserCheck icon, OutputPreview component
- status-check: Stethoscope icon, AlertCard components
- os-selection: Simplified conditional styling

Fixes import error for scaleIn -> fadeScale in landing page.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
